programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails gets a megadose of Robotniks growth gas and grows quickly to monstrous proportions, eating everything in sight and accidentally terrorizing the countryside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale - a thug as brutal as his name - to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea. Needing some water-breathing labor for the job, Brutale steals Marvolio Drake's reptilian pirate crew. Desperate to get his men back, Drake forms an unlikely alliance with the Shane Gang, who are just as desperate to shut the Dark Water rig down.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Lumino cavern is under attack! A swarm of Neurotox ghoul slugs have created a massive toxic cloud that's attacking the residents. The Shane Gang must brave an inescapable maze called the Cavern of Time to locate Blite, the only man who knows enough about regular Neotox slugs to help them stop the cloud created by the ghouls. Just a few problems with that plan: Blite is a deadly maniac, whose reign of terror ended only after Will Shane trapped him in the Cavern of Time.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers! But they'll need to mod Eli's blaster to handle it. In search of the one missing part that will complete Eli's Double Barreled Blaster, the gang journey to the Scrap Heap, a junk yard cavern of epic proportions. Finding the part isn't easy. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: The little Lugia named Silver has fallen into the hands of Butch and Cassidy of Team Rocket, and with Richie's help, Ash must win the adult Lugia's trust before it gets caught in the same trap!

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee

Caitie knows a song about brushing teeth called "Brush Your Teeth."

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm
programme.desc: Let's celebrate everything that grows with the Growing Song! Have you ever noticed that everything is changing? Watch the different seasons of the year and revisit plants, animals, children, and buildings in the farm and city to see how they've grown. / Let's welcome our new farm friend Bingo the cat! A stray cat called Bingo is found by Ella and Mei outside of the farm. Mei calls the animal rescue center who sends Sami the Vet to check the cat over. Ella and Mei adopt Bingo and invite her to live on the farm. It's great to make new friends! / Mailman Marcus is delivering mail to Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Rishi and Izzy are all excited to see what deliveries he has for them - Ella gets a camera, Risihi gets a ball and Izzy gets a brand new plush toy! Just as Mei thinks that she doesn't have any mail, she gets a photo delivered by a drone. / Ella meets Frogalina (a frog ballerina) who shows her how to enjoy the rain with some splashy ballet dance moves. Inspired, Ella shows Go-Go the cat and Pablo the pig that rain is important, and fun, on Lellobee Farm. / The Boogie Barn needs a new coat of paint. The children and animals all want to help. Mei brings them the paint and they all have fun adding paint and mixing paint to create a multi-coloured Boogie Barn!

programme.title: Lellobee City Farm
programme.desc: Ella takes out a book from the street library, but Rishi is not too bothered. Ella shows him the amazing variety of stories that are available - he just has to find the one that's right for him. Rishi looks at books about cowboys, dragons, spaceships and fairy tales. He wants to hear all their stories! / Lettie, Carlos and Go-Go are unwell so a makeshift animal hospital is set up at the farm. Headaches, temperatures and coughs are all treated. Ella helps Sami the vet, and soon the animals are all feeling better. Well done Ella and Sami! / A song that highlights what habits everyone should do daily in order to lead a healthy life - brushing their teeth, washing their hands, eating healthy foods and exercising. 'If you want a good day, do everything the healthy way, healthy is the way to be, with your friends at Lellobee City Farm! / Ella, Rishi and Izzy are playing in the playground but Ella falls off the swing, Rishi crashes his scooter and Ben flies off the end of the slide. Ouch! Ouch! Ouch! Fortunately their parents and grandparents are there to pick them up, dust them off and send them on their way again. / It's animal bath time at the farm! With a fun twist on the traditional lyrics of 'Head and Shoulders, Knees and Toes', Ella and Rishi wash the "Mane, Muzzle, Back and Hooves" of Heidi the horse, Pablo the pig and Mama Duck. It's time to get scrubbing!

programme.title: YummiLand

A Num Nom is stuck in a jiggly bounce house, an ice cream comet is barreling down towards YummiLand, and a sprinkle avalanche has trapped Num Noms! Piper, Maya, Callie, Rory, Bianca, and Greta must use teamwork and lip gloss power to save the day. Each Yummi has a special superpower that comes to life after she applies her magical lip gloss. Piper Peach makes her stuffed bunny come to life. Maya Watermelon can duplicate. Callie Birthday Cake can fly. Rory Blueberry can jump super high. A giant licorice twister is barreling through YummiLand, sweeping up Piper Peach's stuffed bunny! She hops in the Lip Gloss Truck to rescue her. Then, a rock candy ice storm has frozen everything in sight, including all of the Num Noms. And when Maya's new experiment goes awry, she turns Rory's Num Nom into a Godzilla-like monster! Our heroic Yummis use teamwork and lip gloss power to save the day.

programme.title: Earth to Luna!
programme.desc: What adults often take for granted in life's minutiae frequently delights children. One of those kids is Luna, a six-year-old, for whom the world is a giant laboratory, filled with opportunities to learn more about what things are, and why and how scientific actions take place. Luna's passion for science prompts her exploration of the world with energy and enthusiasm. Little brother Jupiter and pet ferret Clive are by her side as the inquisitive girl pursues answers to her specific questions.

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Young, tech-savvy Dot is a true child of the 21st century -- she is well-versed in technology and has a strong curiosity and thirst for knowledge. She uses electronic devices to help her learn, create and explore, but she always makes sure to unplug and enjoy quality time with friends, family and pet dog Scratch. She explores the world and goes on adventures with her buds, including best friend Hal, and pooch to satisfy her curiosity and find out more about what goes on around her. Dot gets her passion for technology from her techie mother, who develops apps, while her father is more old-school with a love for woodworking and would rather enjoy the simple things in life than be tethered to electronics. The animated series is based on a children's book written by technology advocate Randi Zuckerberg, who calls the titular character "relatable" and says she is "that friend we all have who is energetic, adventurous and imaginative."

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Fernanda y Leonardo trazan un plan para engañar a Ignacio. Ella logra conseguir las contraseñas y Leonardo bloquea las cuentas de la empresa. Leonardo descubre que Basilio sabe de finanzas, le pide disculpas y le agradece su ayuda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda. Se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.desc: Julia escucha a Pablo decir que no quiere quedarse en el pueblo por miedo a enamorarse de ella. Socorro propicia un encuentro con Juan de Dios para acercarse a él.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Un hombre regresa a su pueblo tras 12 años de ausencia y se impresiona ante la belleza de su amor de la juventud.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia grita con desesperación al no poder evitar la muerte de su madrina. Dinorah descubre que Rufino es responsable de la muerte de Amalia. Don Samuel se entera de las consecuencias del incendio.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Dinorah descubre el crimen que cometió Rufino y sus planes para evadir la Justicia. Pablo descubre que Gina tendrá una cita con Enrique. Fausto le cuenta a Julia lo mucho que sufrió con la muerte de Margarita.

programme.title: Las Golfas
programme.desc: Cuando despiden a Diana del cabaret donde trabaja, Luis la aloja desinteresadamente. Sin embargo, cuando intentan escapar de un traficante de drogas, los problemas los siguen.

programme.title: Pecado
programme.desc: Una muchacha de otra sociedad disfruta de sus visitas a bares prohibidos, donde se enamora del dueño de uno.

programme.title: El día de las madres
programme.desc: Los habitantes de una vecindad su reúnen para celebrar el "Día de las madres" y reconocen el sacrificio de ellas.

programme.title: Balún Canán
programme.desc: Unos brujos condenan a una mujer a un destino feroz porque hizo cosas crueles para conservar su finca.

programme.title: Dinamita Kid
programme.desc: Un hombre se convierte en luchador y se hace llamar "Dinamita Kid" para enfrentar al experimentado Huracán Ramírez.

programme.title: Camino del Infierno
programme.desc: Una mujer se enamora de un hombre que tiene un garfio reemplazando su mano y al que abandona cuando cree tener lepra.

programme.title: Rincón Brujo
programme.desc: Durante la revolución, un contrabandista de armas llega a un pueblo donde se enamora de la hija de un capitán.

programme.title: Los olvidados
programme.desc: Una historia de Luis Buñuel, acerca de la pobreza y el crimen juvenil en los suburbios de la Ciudad de México.

programme.title: La mujer y la bestia
programme.desc: Tras la violación de su hija por parte de varios trabajadores ferroviarios, una enfermera se convierte por las noches en una letal prostituta que asesina a hombres.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A cada día su pesar y su esperanza
programme.desc: Una joven embarazada descubre que tiene una enfermedad y está decidida a luchar por ella y el bebé que espera.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale un cobarde vivo que un héroe muerto
programme.desc: Un joven ingresa a una nueva escuela y teme que vuelva a ser víctima de bullying por desgracia, se pone en la mira de uno de sus compañeros. La presión y el continuo bullying hará que el joven llegue a un límite inesperado.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Suegra, nuera y yerno, antesala al infierno
programme.desc: Una joven decide no asistir a la escuela para encontrarse con su novio, él la lleva a su casa a conocer a su familia, pero no todos los planes que tienen saldrán como esperan.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Humano es el errar y divino el perdonar
programme.desc: Durante una sesión fotográfica en la calle una chica sufre un accidente que la deja parapléjica. La madre de la joven culpa a su hijo por el accidente y está dispuesta a hacer lo que sea para que su hija vuelva a caminar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Educar no es llenar una cubeta, sino encender una hoguera
programme.desc: Una maestra llega a una comunidad para ayudar a la gente a aprender un idioma, pero descubre que las personas del lugar se avergüenzan de su origen.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A enemigo que huye, puente de plata
programme.desc: Roberta es nueva en el colegio y está a punto de cumplir sus 15 años, así que invita a sus compañeros a su fiesta, pero Eloísa tiene celos de ella y no le dejará el camino tan fácil.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Pocos ven lo que somos, pero todos ven lo que aparentamos
programme.desc: Por su forma de vestir y comportarse, una joven no es aceptada por sus compañeros de escuela, la critican y discriminan, incluso divulgan el rumor que ella es lesbiana, pero algo sucede en el colegio que ayuda a aclarar las cosas.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De poquito en poquito se llena el jarrito
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos tendrá que afrontar una serie de obstáculos para que su grupo musical llegue al éxito, desde una lucha de egos, robos y la presencia de un promotor musical que solo busca aprovecharse de ellos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pepe Aguilar, Danna Paola y Dulce María
programme.desc: Este programa cuenta con grandes invitados como Pepe Aguilar, Danna Paola, Dulce María, Erick Rubín, Ha Ash, Kpaz de la Sierra y Pablo Montero, los cuales interpretan una canción junto a los pequeños.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pierre Ángelo, Albertano y el Compayito
programme.desc: Guerra de chistes, sketch cómico con Pierre Angelo, baile y canciones complementan este divertido programa. Como invitados especiales: Albertano y el Compayito. Por último, Gloria Trevi nombrará a alguien como 'Gigante de la Noche'.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños gigantes deleitarán al grupo OV7 con una presentación en la que cantarán sus mayores éxitos.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: El programa se viste de gala para recibir a Lupita D'Alessio. Montserrat y Angelique Boyer interpretarán el drama "Telesa".

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Edición especial supremacistas: Las redes del odio
programme.desc: Se muestran a los nuevos supremacistas y se analiza la manera en la que utilizan los medios sociales para atraer a nuevos miembros.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La violencia se ha apoderado de las vidas de miles de mujeres que han sido asesinadas brutalmente por sus propias parejas, por lo que los movimientos contra feminicidios han incrementado considerablemente.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Algunos fueron perseguidos y separados de sus familias, otros llevados a campos de concentración y exterminados, hoy, algunos de los sobrevivientes narran el horror del holocausto judío.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: La vida en juego: fútbol y violencia en la frontera
programme.desc: Un programa especial que muestra la vida de cuatro jugadores de fútbol americano en Brownsville, Texas, quienes se enfrentan a una dura realidad de violencia, pobreza, drogas, pero siempre con ilusión de una vida mejor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.desc: Por décadas el narcotráfico ha navegado sigilosamente por los mares más peligrosos para transportar su mercancía, poniendo en peligro la vida de sus tripulantes a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: John Patitucci, Marco Pignataro, Joe Lovano & Terri Lyne Carrington
programme.sub-title: The Tällberg Foundation: "Jazz for the Planet
programme.desc: On October 19, 2021, John Patitucci (bass), Marco Pignataro (sax and musical director), and Joe Lovano (sax) showcased inspirational new originals at GBH's Fraser Performance Studio in Boston, MA, accompanied by Terri Lyne Carrington (drums), Nadia Washington (vocals), Chico Pinheiro (guitar), and Anastassiya Petrova (piano). This recording, titled 'Tällberg's Jazz for the Planet', was made in support of the Tällberg Foundation's message and aims to inspire positive climate action. Since 1981, the Tällberg Foundation has been trying to nurture new thinking, in part by looking at societal challenges through the lenses of artists.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Michael Mossman
programme.sub-title: Munich Philharmonic Hall: Michel Camilo Quintet
programme.desc: Well-known for his exuberant style and intimate familiarity with a vast range of jazz and Latin idioms, Michel Camilo has always had a sixth sense for musical adventure. Camilo was one of the most stimulating jazz pianists to emerge in the mid- to late '80s. His powerful two-handed attack (full of impressive technical skills), his knowledge of both jazz and Afro-Cuban music, and his willingness to constantly take chances turn each of his solos into an adventure. This broadcast was taped during the 1991 Münchner Klaviersommer, when Camilo was playing with his amazing Quintet. He is accompanied by Ned Mann (bass), Cliff Almond (drums), Michel Mossman (trumpet and trombone) and Ralph Bowen (saxophone and flute). Camilo's rise to fame has been swift, and his influences range from jazz musicians like Art Tatum and Keith Jarrett to twentieth-century composers like Debussy and Ravel.

programme.title: Anita Oday
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: China Moses, Joe Armon Jones & Luke Wynter
programme.sub-title: China Moses: 'Whatever' at Jazz à Ramatuelle
programme.desc: In 1988, Dee Dee Bridgewater was one of the first great jazz singers to perform at the Jazz Festival in Ramatuelle. In 2016, the story seems to repeat itself as her daughter China Moses took the stage at Ramatuelle. Over the years, China Moses has become a mature performer with a unique style: rocky voice, sharp sense of swing, and intense/energetic stage presence. After signing compilations dedicated to Dinah Washington and blues, Moses released in 2016 an album of his own compositions, entitled "Whatever". Get ready for a most entertaining performance combining jazz, soul, and hip-hop.

programme.title: Yumi Ito
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Freddie Hubbard, Al Grey, Alvin Batiste & Al Casey
programme.sub-title: Freddie Hubbard & The Satchmo Legacy Live in 1987
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. This concert of Freddie Hubbard and the Satchmo Legacy in 1987, highlights the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. Hubbard is an American jazz trumpeter whose unmistakable and influential tone contributed to new perspectives for modern jazz and bebop. He was also a well-known part of Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers and is primarily known for playing bebop, hard bop, and post-bop styles from the early '60s onwards.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Coleman Hawkins
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou & Cristina Marton-Argerich
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - II
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored repertoire for piano and violin in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Theodosia Ntokou, and Cristina Marton-Argerich, and violinist Maxim Vengerov. On the program are Dmitri Shostakovich's Concertino for two pianos, Op. 94 Frédéric Chopin's Impromptu No. 3, Op. 51, Polonaise No. 6, Op. 53 “Heroic”, and Waltz No. 6, Op. 64 No. 1 Camille Saint-Saëns's Polonaise for two pianos, Op. 77 César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano in A major and Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid and Schön Rosmarin. This performance was recorded on June 12, 2021.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Juliane Banse, Emmanuel Pahud & Claudio Bohorquez
programme.desc: The extraordinarily talented pianist Elena Bashkirova has been president of the Felix Mendelssohn-Bartholdy Foundation in Leipzig since October 2020, succeeding legendary conductor Kurt Masur. In this concert at the Mendelssohn House in Leipzig, Bashkirova is joined by soprano Juliane Banse, flutist Emmanuel Pahud, cellist Claudio Bohórquez, clarinettist Karl-Heinz Steffens, and pianist Ohad Ben-Ari in a chamber music program dedicated to the music of Mendelssohn and his sister Fanny Hensel. The program opens with Mendelssohn's Piano Trio in D minor, Op. 49. This is followed by a selection of songs: Mendelssohn's Schilflied ‘Auf dem Teich, dem regungslosen', Op. 71 No. 4, and Reiselied ‘Der Herbstwind rüttelt die Bäume', Op. 34 No. 6 Hensel's Vorwurf, Op. 10 No. 2 Verlust, Op. 9 No. 10 and Sehnsucht, Op. 9 No. 7 Mendelssohn's ‘Allnächtlich im Traume seh ich dich', Op. 86 No. 4 ‘Die Liebende schreibt', Op. 86 No. 3 and Nachtlied ‘Vergangen ist der lichte Tag', Op. 71 No. 6. The program continues with Mendelssohn's Seven Songs without Words, for piano four-hands (Op. 62 Nos. 1-6, and Op. 67 No. 1), and comes to a close with Mendelssohn's Three pieces for clarinet, violoncello and piano (arr. Ernst Naumann), comprising Prelude, Op. 35 No. 4, Songs without Words, Op. 53 No. 2, and Duet, Op. 38 No. 6. This performance was recorded in November 2020.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55
programme.desc: Maestro Herbert Blomstedt makes his debut with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra at 2020's Lucerne Festival conducting Ludwig van Beethoven's celebrated Symphony No. 3 in E-flat major, Op. 55, “Eroica”. The sprightly Swedish conductor celebrated his 93rd birthday just one month before this performance. This remarkable performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: Costanza Principe
programme.desc: Italian classical pianist Costanza Principe (1993) started playing the piano at age 6, making her public debut at age 7. Before long she would be performing as a soloist with numerous prestigious orchestras in Italy, the UK, France, and South America. Seen here in 2021 at one of Italy's oldest extant Renaissance theatres, the gorgeous Teatro Olimpico in the northern Italian town of Vicenza, Principe performs Johann Sebastian Bach's ‘Concerto italiano' and ‘Ciaccona', as transcribed for piano by Ferruccio Busoni.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Schubert - Symphony No. 8 in B minor, D. 759
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance Les Dissonances perform Franz Schubert's Symphony No. 8 in B minor, D. 759, also known as the ‘Unfinished Symphony'. Schubert started composing the work in 1822, but only completed the first two movements. The first movement, Allegro moderato, has a dark, mysterious mood, which contrasts with the beautiful second movement in E major, Andante con moto. Schubert only penned a couple of measures of the third movement, a Scherzo, in full score. It is not known why the composer never finished his symphony. Although it is not complete, it has become one of Schubert's most popular compositions. This performance was recorded at Cité de la musique in Paris, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Daryl Hall & John Oates
programme.sub-title: Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
programme.desc: When Daryl Hall and John Oates took to the stage at Sydney's Entertainment Centre as the iconic bass line of ‘Maneater' began to play, the fans knew they were in for a treat. This duo may have been opening concerts with that irresistibly smooth number for years, but it never seems to lose its magic, and the crowd – an eclectic mix of teens and baby boomers alike – lapped it up. Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, and although Oates no longer sports his signature ‘tache, they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Earworms like ‘I Can't Go For That', ‘Out Of Touch' and ‘Kiss On My List' were surefire reminders that these guys are absolute hit machines, and their catchy synth-soul classics probably deserve to permeate the airwaves as much today as they did decades ago. These Philly crooners still have it in bucket-loads, so this show should have everyone from diehard Daryl Hall and John Oates fans to kids of the 80's groovin' along in no time.

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: The Lumineers
programme.desc: The Lumineers bring energetic American folk-rock to the picturesque Musilac Festival. You won't be able to resist clapping along and stomping your feet to the band's raw sound and enchanting music.

programme.title: Primal Scream
programme.desc: Primal Scream is a Scottish rock band originally formed in 1982 in Glasgow by Bobby Gillespie (vocals) and Jim Beattie. The lineup consists of Gillespie, Andrew Innes (guitar), Martin Duffy (keyboards), Simone Butler (bass) and Darrin Mooney (drums). Barrie Cadogan has toured and recorded with the band since 2006, as a replacement after the departure of guitarist Robert "Throb" Young.

programme.title: Paul Weller
programme.desc: Starting out with the band The Jam (1976–82), Weller branched out to a more soulful style with The Style Council (1983–89), before establishing himself as a successful solo artist in 1991. He is also the principal figure of the 1970s and 1980s mod revival, and is often referred to as The Modfather.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Whales features the ocean's most majestic creatures. This Wild Window contains spectacular images of humpback whales, sperm whales, and blue whales.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Beneath the Sea a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world. Captured in exclusively in 8K digital, Beneath the Sea features an award-winning original score by Alan Williams.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Coral Kingdoms was filmed on the kaleidoscopic reefs of Indonesia and the Maldives Islands.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Forest in the Sea captures the unusual beauty of undersea kelp forests from Alaska to Southern California.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Flying Over Fiji Islands 2
programme.desc: "Flying over Fiji Islands 2" offers a 1-hour and 42-minute journey across Fiji's majestic landscapes. Combining nature sounds with ambient music by The Cynic Project, it features smooth ground-level and aerial shots, concluding with a breathtaking real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Flying Over Bermuda
programme.desc: "Flying Over Bermuda" offers an 80-minute relaxation journey above Bermuda's turquoise waters and coastlines in 4K Ultra HD. Filmed by Noel Thomas, it features sights like Horseshoe Bay and the Vixen shipwreck, with music by The Cynic Project and other artists

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Sunny Getaways

programme.title: Return to Paradise 2
programme.desc: Escape to one of the world's most idyllic tropical islands for 2 hours of relaxing on the beach with "Return to Paradise,." The sequel to "A Day in Paradise" (2014), the film returns viewers to the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku - a tiny palm-covered sandy atoll surrounded by magical lagoons brimming with sea life. The film lasts for 2 full hours and features a dynamic mix of stunning tropical island beach & palm tree scenes that will gently transport viewers around the island. Each scene lasts several minutes, allowing time to soak up the views & absorb the healing energies which paradise provides! There are also some aerial drone clips to give the viewer perspective from above.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise 2
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sea turtles, for 2 full hours of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Best of Inspiring Forest Trail
programme.desc: A unique spot in the heart of the Laurentians: gaze over the peaceful lake as its smooth waves gently crawl to the shore.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E2: Cinematice Dimensions — Immerse yourself in a visual journey where shapes dance and colors converse, inviting you to redefine the way you perceive art. Dare to experience the extraordinary with soft and deep house beats.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Trending Art S1E1 — A curated collection of artwork from both emerging talents and established artists, meticulously handpicked by our expert curation team. The diverse array of artistic visions is a testament to creativity and the power of visual expression.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Elegant Objects E1 — Indulge in a mesmerizing collection of artwork that unveils the eternal allure of still life compositions and enchanting objects. Each is a symphony of form, color, and light, celebrating the everyday.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E11: Shades Of Brown — Celebrate the rich and earthy palette of brown. From warm sepia tones to deep siennas, the artwork evoke a sense of grounded elegance and rustic charm, exploring the diverse emotions and textures of this versatile color.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E4: Shades of Pink — Showcasing the gorgeous yet delicate energy of pink, utilizing shades ranging from soft blush to bright fuchsia to evoke a sense of sweetness, romance, and vibrancy.

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.
